title: Music question
wikitext:
[]: Music question             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sat Jun 26, 2004 5:36 pm Ok, so anyone know those songs they play in Eva? For example: When Toji and Kenske are seeing Shinji off at the station, some music starts playing. Another time is when Misato and Kaji are sharing an intimate moment in bed there is some more of that same music. These songs are vocal and have an old J-Pop sound to them. First of all, does anyone have any idea what I'm going on about? If you do, do you know if a CD was released with this music on it? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 27, 2004 1:11 am I once found a guide to the BG tracks in Eva. Theres a few tracks from the soundtrack that get put in some of those scenes. But mostly they are in fact J-pop tracks. From what I remember, the majority were from the Ys OST. I once posted a topic about this at Evangelion Portal. I was trying to dig it up so I could put it up on the site. The only person who knew anything decided to pick a fight with me.

[]:             Quote Post by MDWigs » Wed Jun 30, 2004 11:20 am Most of the songs on Shinji's SDAT are j-pop songs sung by Mitsuishi Kotono (Misato's voice actor) which vfeature on the Lilia ~from Ys~ album. I've got a list of some of the other songs and when they are used, but its on my computer back home.

[]: the beethster             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Mon Sep 13, 2004 4:47 pm Beethoven's ninth symphony is what got me more in to eva i saw the trailer to EoE and got me hooked.

[]: Re: Music question             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Oct 05, 2004 4:09 am wildarmsheero wrote: Ok, so anyone know those songs they play in Eva? For example: When Toji and Kenske are seeing Shinji off at the station, some music starts playing. Another time is when Misato and Kaji are sharing an intimate moment in bed there is some more of that same music. These songs are vocal and have an old J-Pop sound to them.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Oct 05, 2004 5:16 am Dude! Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Oct 05, 2004 8:47 am whats an OST?

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Tue Oct 05, 2004 12:04 pm Original Sound Track. C'mon, we're anime fans, here!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Oct 05, 2004 5:17 pm sorry..just didnt know... and is Shinji always listening to j-pop?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Oct 05, 2004 7:11 pm Not always. In episode 24 he somehow manages to find a casette with Ode to Joy on it. :)

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Oct 05, 2004 9:03 pm i thought it was kawuro humming it....

[]: Music question             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sat Jun 26, 2004 5:36 pm Ok, so anyone know those songs they play in Eva? For example: When Toji and Kenske are seeing Shinji off at the station, some music starts playing. Another time is when Misato and Kaji are sharing an intimate moment in bed there is some more of that same music. These songs are vocal and have an old J-Pop sound to them. First of all, does anyone have any idea what I'm going on about? If you do, do you know if a CD was released with this music on it? Thanks!
